name: Feature request / placement proposal

## Placement check

> Code belongs in `orkyo-foundation` if it has an analogue in **both** `orkyo-saas` and `orkyo-community`.
> Single-tenancy alone is NOT a reason to keep code here.

- [ ] This feature is specific to single-tenant / self-hosted deployment.
- [ ] OR: this has a SaaS analogue and should be proposed in `orkyo-foundation` instead.

## What you want to add

<!-- Describe the feature. -->

## Why it belongs in Community (not foundation)

<!-- What makes this specific to single-tenant or self-hosted operation? -->

## Proposed behaviour

<!-- User-visible or operator-visible change. Include any config, CLI, or API surface. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any alternative approaches or reasons not to implement this. -->

## Impact on self-hosters

- [ ] No change to the release bundle or upgrade path.
- [ ] Release bundle change — QUICKSTART / OPERATIONS docs need updating.
- [ ] Breaking change for existing self-hosted deployments.
